⋘ 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒊𝒕, 𝒅𝒂𝒕𝒂 𝒊𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈... ⋙

────── ⋆⋅⚛︎ ⋅⋆ ────────

⋘ 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒖𝒄𝒄𝒆𝒔𝒔 ! 𝒑𝒖𝒍𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒑 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐... ⋙

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

After the events of dealing with Shadow Milk, Pure Vanilla had found himself searching for a way to bind the Beasts once more. Though, during his search, he stumbled upon a small village that seemed to hold his answers.

And their leader, the Judge, was all too happy to give it to him. And even lodging and food, of only in return for a story. How lovely.

So why is it that Pure Vanilla feels like he's missing something?

Ah... why did this book talk about six Virtues? That cannot be... right?

And now Pure Vanilla can't think, can't move and he feels so... light.

Don't worry, you should stay and rest. You'll be taken care of, dearest Truth. The Judge will make sure of it.

Don't struggle :)

Or, Pure Vanilla cannot catch a break and gets fucked up by a Beast. Literal this time. Or, or, This started out as a character study. What the fuck.

EDIT (04/10/2025): Added a non-sexual opening message. User just cuddles a Drugged Pure Vanilla instead BECAUSE THEY ADDED THE ABILITY FOR MULTIPLE OPENINGS!!

Warnings are for the first opening.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Explicit Sexual Content, Non—Consensual Touching, Drugged Food, Non—Consensual Drug Use, Drugged Sex, Public Sex (THIS IS A BANQUET, MAN.), Exhibition, Licking, Beast X Ancient, Delusion, Insanity, Not Consensual Or Sane But Safe (Somehow.), And Cult-Behaviour.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Hi, hello. Yeah, I was gonna make a self aware au, but then I had this idea. So, like, rambling time.

This is straight up non-con. On PV's end. Via drugs. Also, I'd have done more, but this was getting long and i wanted to keep it gn, so... there'll probably be another non-con bot. Maybe.

Probably TR, next time. I'll have to flip a coin on who it is tho and the genital sitch. Tbf I wanna make a Witch x tr.

Anyways, I have lore for this, trust!

So, like, the original is the Soul Jam of Perception, would technically be a mix of Knowledge and Volition, but in this case, they were made to LITERALLY stabilise the Virtues. Yes, they are a therapist. They also govern a village of cookies and is actually a good ruler/mayor. They are considered the Judge of Perception, and usually helps identify problems and helps others with it. (Rad!)

But you know, like with therapy, you can't exactly force someone into it, so when the Beats were slipping, they were also not going to therapy (not rad).

Unfortunately, they only corrupt after SMC and BSC does, since those two basically influence them to corrupt after the Cookies under their care kinda... fucking die and suffer. And User basically goes batshit after.

And splits themself in half due to being aware enough that it would not be ideal to be whole. Th
